docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, APPEARING IN COURT IS JUSTIN HOLMES. DEFENDANT JALYN PATTON IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
